heading: Recall and Latency Analysis
body:
We observed that it takes significantly more `numCandidates` when using
binary quantization to achieve the 90-95% recall target compared
to baseline. Higher `numCandidates` generally means higher latency,
but this might vary.

![MongoDB Vector Search Concurrency Benchmark Results](/atlas-vector-search/images/avs/performance/recall-latency.png)

To view the full chart, see the [Claude artifact](https://claude.ai/public/artifacts/6459f0c6-e3b1-4e8e-99ca-9dde5439a93d).
